//: Root tsconfig ONLY so Vercel's @vercel/node function compiler — which walks up from api/*.ts and would otherwise fall back to TS defaults — inherits allowImportingTsExtensions (the repo uses explicit .ts import specifiers so Node can run .ts directly). `npm run typecheck` does NOT use this; it runs per-project `tsc -p engine|shells/web|services/mcp|...`. Keep the lib/types in sync with services/mcp/tsconfig.json since the api/mcp function's import graph is engine + services/mcp.
